title: Store
description: Definition of a storage location for artifacts and assets. Stores have semantics that define their behavior (mutable, append-only, versioned, cold). IMPORTANT: Studios operate on an 'open floor' principle - there are no secrets between agents. The Runtime NEVER denies access; workflow_intent provides guidance for orchestration and routing, not authorization. Violations result in nudges and logging, not denial.

description.description: Purpose of this store and what should be stored here

semantics.description: Storage behavior: 'append_only' (write once), 'mutable' (read/write), 'versioned' (history preserved), 'cold' (optimized for long-term read-heavy access)

artifact_types.description: Artifact types that can be stored here. Empty means any type.

asset_types.description: Asset types that can be stored here. Empty means any type.

workflow_intent.description: Workflow guidance: who SHOULD consume/produce data here. This informs orchestration routing, not access control. The Runtime never denies based on this.

asset_storage.description: Configuration for binary asset storage (if this store holds assets)

workflow_intent.description:
Defines intended workflow patterns for this store. Serves TWO purposes:

1. ATTENTION MECHANISM: Helps the Runtime decide what to load into each agent's context. Without this, every agent would need the entire studio state (context window explosion). Example: 'Only load SourceCode store for CodeReviewer, ignore MarketingAssets.'

2. WORKFLOW OBSERVABILITY: Enables nudging and logging when agents deviate from intended patterns. NOT access control - the Runtime never denies access.

consumption_guidance.description: ATTENTION HINT: Which agents should have this store's contents loaded into context by default. 'all' = broadcast, 'specified' = targeted routing, 'none' = on-demand only (reduces noise)

production_guidance.description: RESPONSIBILITY HINT: Who is responsible for producing data here. Used for workflow routing and violation detection. 'exclusive' means single-owner semantics (e.g., Lorekeeper owns canon store).

designated_consumers.description: If consumption_guidance='specified': agents whose context should include this store by default

designated_producers.description: If production_guidance='specified': agents responsible for producing to this store

duration_days.description: For 'duration' type, how many days to keep

max_count.description: For 'count' type, maximum number of items (oldest removed)

max_versions.description: For versioned stores, max versions per artifact to keep

base_path.description: For filesystem backend, the base directory path

bucket.description: For cloud backends, the bucket/container name
